title: Codex agent guard: PreToolUse spawn_agent entry + model-guard support for the observed Codex spawn ABI
action: Close the Codex-side guard gap (decision 0023 parity + D4 lineage; D8 custom agents stay deferred — this guard is NOT D8). Spike-observed ABI (codex-cli 0.144.4): tool_name spawn_agent, tool_input {agent_type: "worker", message: "..."} — the authoritative prompt field is MESSAGE, not prompt; the [bee-tier:] marker anchors at the start of tool_input.message. Read both capability matrix files first. (1) hooks/catalog.mjs: add a PreToolUse guard entry matching spawn_agent to the CODEX projections ONLY (plugin projection + repo target; CLAUDE projection unchanged), wired to bee-model-guard.mjs; update ALLOWED_DIFFERENCES including the now-stale rationale at catalog.mjs:260-273 (reword: claude-only refers to the Agent|Task matcher, not to Codex lacking PreToolUse spawn) and the expected Codex command count 12 -> 13. (2) hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs (+ .bee/bin mirror): implement an ISOLATED Codex branch that triggers only on the exact observed envelope — never merge spawn_agent into the generic Claude dispatch set (that would misread real Codex messages as bare dispatches and emit Claude-specific model-param remediation; branch early, leave Claude paths byte-unchanged, see marker extraction ~:75 and Claude enforcement ~:187). Recognition boundary before ANY deny (advisor finding 2, all as fixtures in test_model_guard.mjs): exact captured shape + anchored marker in message = allow; exact shape + mid-message or absent marker = deny (actionable FIX message); missing/null/non-object tool_input = fail open; missing/empty/non-string message = fail open; missing/non-string/unknown agent_type = fail open; prompt-only or top-level toolName alias = fail open; agent_type default/explorer = fail open (only worker was captured); extra fields tolerated once required fields match, but an anchored prompt never rescues an unmarked message. (3) onboard_bee.mjs: ONLY renderCodexHookEntries() (~:1788) gains the entry; renderRepoHookEntries() (Claude) untouched; fix stale comments ~:1758-1765. (4) Regeneration (no generator script exists): pipe node --input-type=module -e imports of renderProjectionText from ./hooks/catalog.mjs to each rendered manifest, preserving trailing-newline bytes; regenerate .codex/hooks.json AGAIN after this cell's catalog change so it carries the guard entry. (5) Add an explicit source<->mirror byte-parity assertion for hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs vs .bee/bin/hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs (the release manifest does not pair them). (6) Spike provenance hygiene: fix the matrix citation of ./evidence/pre_spawn.jsonl (file does not exist; envelope is quoted in prose) to the actual evidence location. (7) Tests: fixtures per (2) in test_model_guard.mjs; test_hook_contracts.mjs + test_onboard_bee.mjs assertions extended (incl. the 13-command count); release manifest regenerated if tracked files changed.

truths: Codex projections carry a PreToolUse spawn_agent guard entry; Claude projection unchanged
bee-model-guard denies bare and mid-text-marker spawn_agent dispatches, allows anchored-marker dispatches, fails open on unparseable payloads — all proven by fixtures
all rendered manifests regenerated through generators; drift checks green; mirror in sync
key_links: guard entry present in .codex/hooks.json and host renderer output
ALLOWED_DIFFERENCES names the intentional Claude/Codex guard difference if the drift-check compares them
prohibitions: No weakening of any existing Claude guard rule
No denial semantics for payload shapes the spike did not observe — unknown shapes fail open, never closed

verify: bash -c 'node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && grep -q "spawn_agent" .codex/hooks.json && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && echo GUARD-OK'

trace.outcome: Codex-side pre-spawn guard closes the decision-0023 parity gap on Codex: catalog now renders a PreToolUse spawn_agent group (Codex projections only; Claude Agent|Task unchanged) wired to bee-model-guard.mjs, which gained an ISOLATED Codex branch keyed on the observed 0.144.4 envelope (agent_type worker + message; [bee-tier:] anchored at start of message) — allows marked, denies unmarked/mid-text, fails open on every unobserved shape. Mirror synced byte-identical + pinned by a new test row; onboarding renderer + host projection updated; Codex command count 12->13 across all manifests and assertions; spike evidence citation corrected. All fixtures + drift/route/onboard checks green.
trace.verification_evidence:
tests_inspected: hooks/test_model_guard.mjs (Claude Agent/Task rows 1-39, all still green), hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs (catalog drift + installed repo-route rows), skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs (Codex projection structural checks).
tests_added_or_changed: test_model_guard rows 40-55 (Codex spawn ABI: allow anchored marker, deny mid-text/absent marker, fail-open on empty/missing/non-string message, non-worker agent_type, non-object tool_input, toolName alias, prompt-does-not-rescue-message, extra fields tolerated, disabled-toggle, Codex-shaped deny text); test_hook_contracts new row model-guard-source-mirror-byte-identical + routeExpectation keyed on script + route-pretooluse-command-present reworked for 2 PreToolUse cmds + counts 12->13 + row id route-config-thirteen-commands; test_onboard_bee inverted stale negative assertion to require the spawn_agent guard entry + count 12->13.
red_before_state: before the guard change a spawn_agent dispatch was not in DISPATCH_TOOLS so it exited 0 (no guard) — new fixtures rows 42/43/51 prove the unmarked/mid-text/prompt-only cases now DENY (exit 2). Running the updated suites against the un-fixed tree first showed the expected RED: test_hook_contracts 4 route failures (PreToolUse now 2 commands; model-guard fails open on apply_patch) and test_onboard 1 failure (stale 'never wires bee-model-guard' assertion) — each fixed at its root.
verification_run: exact cell verify chain (test_model_guard && test_hook_contracts && test_onboard_bee && grep spawn_agent .codex/hooks.json && release_manifest --check && echo GUARD-OK) => GUARD-OK, exit 0. Adjacent full-verify tests (test_lib_mirror, test_verify_manifest, test_release_tuple, census_stale_spawn_syntax, release_manifest --selftest) all PASS.
trace.verify_output: test_model_guard: ALL PASS (incl. rows 40-55 Codex spawn ABI). test_hook_contracts: 178 rows, 0 failing (incl. codex-repo-target-generated-topology=13 cmds, route-config-thirteen-commands, model-guard-source-mirror-byte-identical). test_onboard_bee: failures 0, skipped 1 (pre-existing case-fs skip; .codex/hooks.json wires 13 cmds + spawn_agent guard). grep spawn_agent .codex/hooks.json: match. release_manifest --check: 146 files match. => GUARD-OK
trace.verify_command: bash -c 'node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && grep -q spawn_agent .codex/hooks.json && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && echo GUARD-OK'
